items.name_en: Large Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality 🔮🔮🔮 Price is a bit high 😯 Ohanel 25A "Dark Horse" Backpack. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, with a large internal patch pocket. Retro matte gold hardware, large capacity, fits daily items 👍🏻. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, the long shoulder strap is adjustable. Size: 18*24*6cm/5347

items.name_en: Large Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C Latest Woven Flap Bag, Handwoven Bag, Handwoven Bag Shopping Bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements are indispensable in a vacation vibe. Made with imported natural wheat straw, it's surprising to see so many bright-colored suede handbags in the summer vacation series... Perfect for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, the bag is sure to be adorned with jewelry. The favorite is of course the collector series ice cream cup~Size: 26cm

items.name_en: Large with box batch YSL|LOU LOU Suede Chain Shoulder Bag|||Loulou_Black Brown Suede
items.name_cn:
Large with box batch YSL|LOU LOU Suede Chain Shoulder Bag|||Loulou_Black Brown Suede
The bag perfect for winter is here, coming to you with warmth! The outer layer has a light suede texture that is super soft and comfortable, offering a premium feel right from the start!
With gold vintage hardware, the whole bag has more character! The interior features a compartment for convenient organization. Most importantly, it is very lightweight for personal use, making it absolutely qualified as a daily commuter bag!
Large size 31x21x10
Model 8887 Large

🆕FENDI First is here!!
- Large M80019 size 32.5x15x23.5cm
- Small M80018 size 26x9.5x18cm
